notes:
RetinaTag 1.5.73 — Critical bug-fix release

Fixed:
- Single-instance: second launches now activate the existing window instead of spawning a duplicate process (was racing on SQLite WAL + ONNX sessions)
- Vault P0 leaks: every code path that flips private=1 now encrypts the underlying file + thumbnail and rolls back the on-disk rename if the DB write fails. Patched: batch Vault button, photo private toggle, NSFW auto-hide
- Vault locked rejection: toggle / batch / auto-hide now refuse to proceed when the vault is locked instead of silently leaving plaintext on disk
- XSS / render hardening: filenames, tags, descriptions, and meta fields are HTML-escaped before innerHTML. A file named cat<3.jpg or a tag with & no longer breaks the card grid
- selectPhoto race: clicking photo A then B before A's detail loaded used to overwrite B's panel; now bails out if selection moved on
- Unsaved description: switching photos mid-edit auto-saves the previous photo's typed description instead of silently dropping it
- created_at null guard: restored backups with missing timestamps no longer crash the detail panel render

From v1.5.72:
- Large-library launch freeze fix (spawn_blocking + sequential init)

From v1.5.71:
- Search overhaul (stop-word filtering, per-concept AND logic)

Windows: x86_64 NSIS installer.
macOS: Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3+).
